### Post by Thoop on 2006-05-16
as far as I can see, you don't have the opengl module loaded in your Xorg.conf ;)

### Post by tseliot on 2006-05-16
Type:
```
glxinfo | grep direct
```

if it says "Yes", then it confirms that Cedega's tests are far from being perfect.
